use_cases: Creating scroll-triggered animated content sections with text overlays
Building interactive hero sections with reveal-on-scroll effects
Displaying product features with animated text reveals
Designing testimonial or quote cards with scroll animations
Implementing engaging landing page sections with parallax-like motion
ai_summary: A scroll-animated container component that uses Framer Motion's useScroll and useTransform hooks to create dynamic scaling, rotation, and translation effects as users scroll. The component features a card-like structure where content is revealed with title text floating above through coordinated scroll-driven animations. Includes responsive behavior adapting animations for mobile versus desktop viewports.
